name: ai
title: AI
description: Browser-based AI with SmolLM via WebGPU and cloud AI with OpenAI — demo components, utilities, and worker scripts.
docs: AI integration with browser-based SmolLM (WebGPU, no server) and cloud AI (OpenAI, Anthropic). Set `OPENAI_API_KEY` for cloud AI. SmolLM runs entirely in-browser with no API key needed. Includes demo components and WebGPU detection utility.
